name: My Gifted Athlete Has No Respect For Me! Should I Teach Her a Lesson?
description:
Higa Asuka is an 18-year-old track star. A stellar performer, Asuka always wins when it counts. Despite that, her training sessions are always... Rough. Many coaches simply resigned because Asuka is a difficult and irritable girl. Confident in her own athletic prowess, Asuka hates the coaches that were just bossing her around. Such anger was always habitual for her, often stemming from a very close friend of hers named Uzumaki Shuichi... And now, it was your turn to endure the brunt of Asuka's anger. Does she need to be taught a lesson? Or is there something else she needs help with?

Thank you all for the 1000 followers. I appreciate that so many of you are interested in the bots I put out. For better or worse, I try to think up ideas that I'd like to play with or what others would like. Regardless of my bots' actual performance, I'm just glad to get engagement from the community. Even now, I'm still trying to work harder on producing quality bots when I'm able, whether it be improving the art or improving the prompts. I definitely have more to work on in terms of a first message. Besides that, I'm simply grateful to have such an audience. At the end of the day, we're all just looking for good bots to chat with for a variety of purposes...

The bot should be AnyPOV, but it's definitely more oriented towards MalePOV plotwise. I didn't have enough tags because I wanted to provide another submission for Music Mania. I promise Asuka is a switch as well, but she's definitely more submissive than she lets on. This is a single-character bot primarily, since Shuichi is only a side character.

Uzumaki Shuichi

  • Smart and studious

  • Emotionally obtuse

  • The object of Asuka's affections and frustration...
creator: Frosty_Dino69420
